title: Wall Street Sees SpaceX’s AI Revenue 100 Times Higher by 2030
title_cn: 华尔街预计 SpaceX 的人工智能收入到 2030 年将增长 100 倍
summary: Research analysts across Wall Street are telling would-be SpaceX IPO buyers that they’re modeling for the company’s artificial intelligence division to see 100 times revenue growth at the end of the decade, to help justify a targeted $1.8 trillion valuation.

title: New ‘60 Minutes’ Chief Tells Staff Ellisons Won’t Influence Show
title_cn: 新《60 分钟》主管告诉员工埃里森斯不会影响节目
summary: Nick Bilton, the new executive producer of 60 Minutes, sought to quell newsroom unrest after former anchor Scott Pelley accused the program of bending to political pressure.

title: ‘Sell Indonesia’ Sweeps Trading Desks as Prabowo Tightens Grip
title_cn: 普拉博沃加强控制，“出售印尼”席卷交易柜台
summary: Global investors are rapidly losing confidence in Indonesia as the nation’s stocks tumble at the fastest pace worldwide and its currency sinks to all-time lows.

title: S&P 500 Weekly Streak at Risk as AI Slide Deepens: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着人工智能下滑加深，标准普尔 500 指数每周连续走势面临风险：市场休整
summary: The S&P 500 is set to break a historic weekly run of gains as the artificial-intelligence trade takes another leg lower, with investors also expecting payrolls data to affirm that interest rates will stay higher for longer.

title: Danantara Plans Low-Yield Bond as Investors Shun Indonesia
title_cn: 由于投资者避开印度尼西亚，达纳塔拉计划发行低收益债券
summary: Indonesia’s sovereign wealth fund Danantara is planning to sell local-currency bonds that will pay interest below market rates at a time when global investors are rapidly losing confidence in the nation’s markets.

title: Southeast Asia Gets Some Inflation Relief as Fuel Pressures Ease
title_cn: 随着燃油压力缓解，东南亚通胀得到一定缓解
summary: The war-driven inflation surge unexpectedly eased in two Southeast Asian nations, signaling central banks in the region may have a bit more breathing room before needing to raise interest rates.

title: Gold Declines as Uncertainty Surrounds Progress in US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 由于美伊谈判进展存在不确定性，金价下跌
summary: Gold headed for a weekly loss as uncertainty persisted over progress in US-Iran talks to end the war that’s roiled global markets.

title: AllianzGI Is Said in Exclusive Talks to Buy UOB Asset Management
title_cn: 据称 AllianzGI 正在就收购大华资产管理公司进行独家谈判
summary: Allianz Global Investors is in exclusive talks to buy the asset management division of Singapore’s United Overseas Bank Ltd., according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Purbaya Slams ‘Sell Indonesia’ Trade, Won’t Quit as Finance Head
title_cn: 普尔巴亚猛烈抨击“出售印尼”贸易，但不会辞去财务主管职务
summary: Indonesian Finance Minister Purbaya Yudhi Sadewa defended his economic track record and said he’d stay in his job after the rupiah plunged to a record low, pointing to inflows into the debt market as proof investors remain optimistic.

title: Schonfeld Sees Possible Yield Spike If Burnham Wins
title_cn: 舍恩菲尔德认为，如果伯纳姆获胜，产量可能会飙升
summary: Colin Lancaster, EMEA Head and Global Co-Head of Discretionary Macro and Fixed Income at Schonfeld, discusses the gilt market and how the upcoming Makerfield by-election may deliver further volatility. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Carmignac Sees Deficits Making Central Banks Inflation Tolerant
title_cn: 卡米尼亚克认为赤字使央行能够容忍通胀
summary: Carmignac is extending the maturity of its inflation-linked bond holdings in a bet that mounting pressure on government budgets will push central banks to tolerate higher inflation in coming years.

title: Global Food Prices Steady Near Highest Level in Three Years
title_cn: 全球食品价格稳定在三年来最高水平附近
summary: Global food prices remained near the highest level in more than three years, after a drop in the cost of palm and soy oils countered disruptions to key agricultural input flows from the Iran war.

title: Korean Markets Buckle as Foreigners Sell $10 Billion in a Week
title_cn: 外国人一周卖出 100 亿美元，韩国市场崩溃
summary: After drawing much awe with the pace of its rise this year, South Korea’s $4.7 trillion stock market is starting to flash signs of strain.

title: China Allows Some Banks to Offer Higher Rates on Dollar Deposits
title_cn: 中国允许部分银行提高美元存款利率
summary: China is allowing some banks to offer higher interest rates on corporate US dollar deposits, according to people familiar with the matter, a move that may damp the yuan’s recent gains by encouraging companies to slow their currency conversion.

title: Indonesia Releases Details on Export Overhaul of Palm, Coal
title_cn: 印度尼西亚公布棕榈和煤炭出口改革细节
summary: Indonesia unveiled a much-anticipated list of commodities subject to its new export regime, showing the rules will capture most of its major palm oil products in addition to coal and ferronickel.

title: Jollibee Is Said to Mull Moving US Listing to Booming Hong Kong
title_cn: 据称快乐蜂正在考虑将美国上市迁往蓬勃发展的香港
summary: Jollibee Foods Corp. is considering switching a potential spinoff and listing of its international business from the US to Hong Kong, where share sales are flying, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Once a Turkey Bull, Algebris Shifts to CDS as Credit Risks Rise
title_cn: 随着信用风险上升，Algebris 一度看好土耳其，转向 CDS
summary: Algebris Investments is buying default protection on Turkish bonds, as it sees a higher probability of a credit event with the Iran war increasing strains on the economy.

title: EM Stocks, Currencies Dragged Down by Korean Market Selloff
title_cn: 新兴市场股票和货币受韩国市场抛售拖累
summary: Emerging market assets fell for the third straight session, led by a selloff in South Korean equities as investor enthusiasm for artificial intelligence stocks waned.

title: Bank of Ghana Says Economy Remains Resilient
title_cn: 加纳银行表示经济保持弹性
summary: Ghana's central bank says there could be room to resume monetary easing if the impact of external shocks begins to fade. Governor Johnson Pandit Asiama told Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja that the country remains resilient for now, despite higher oil prices and ongoing uncertainty linked to the Iran conflict. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Cuts Bond Tax, Eases Access for Global Funds to Lift Rupee
title_cn: 印度削减债券税，放宽全球基金准入以提振卢比
summary: India’s central bank and government took coordinated steps to shore up the rupee after it plunged to a record low, turning to its playbook from the 2013 taper tantrum to spur foreign inflows.

title: China Crude Buying Seen Languishing for Months as Demand Tumbles
title_cn: 随着需求下降，中国原油购买量持续数月低迷
summary: China’s crude imports plunged in May to the lowest level in a decade and could languish for the coming months, as weaker demand, refinery cuts and limited exports help the world’s top buyer weather the impact of the Iran War.

title: Ghana Central Bank Head Sees Scope for Rate Cuts After Iran War
title_cn: 加纳央行行长认为伊朗战争后有降息空间
summary: Bank of Ghana Governor Johnson Asiama played down the weakness of the cedi this year and said policymakers could resume cutting interest rates once the Iran war ends.

title: Hidden AI Winners in India Add $47 Billion on Data-Center Frenzy
title_cn: 印度隐藏的人工智能赢家在数据中心热潮中增加了 470 亿美元
summary: The overarching narrative is that Indian equity markets missed out on the global artificial intelligence boom. But a look under the hood reveals a slew of smaller firms winning from trillions of dollars being spent on AI capacity.

title: China Scrutiny of Cross-Border Flows Sparks Concerns in HK | The China Show 6/5/2026
title_cn: 中国对跨境流动的审查引发香港担忧中国展 6/5/2026
summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, David Ingles and Yvonne Man give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/6/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/6/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Steadies After First Drop This Week on Peace Talk Optimism
title_cn: 由于和平谈判乐观情绪，油价本周首次下跌后企稳
summary: Oil steadied as optimism over US-Iran peace talks countered uncertainty surrounding a ceasefire deal between Israel and Lebanon.

title: Fahmy: Trump Weary of Returning to Obama Era JCPOA
title_cn: 法赫米：特朗普厌倦了回到奥巴马时代 JCPOA
summary:
There has been no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and as the Tehran-backed Hezbollah rejected a US-brokered truce in Lebanon. Dalia Fahmy, Director of International Relations and Diplomacy and Associate Professor of Political Science at Long Island University spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on the potential end to the war in the region.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: European Gas Set for Weekly Gain With US-Iran Deal Still Elusive
title_cn: 欧洲天然气周度上涨，美伊协议仍难以实现
summary: European natural gas prices headed for a weekly gain as uncertainty over the prospects for a peace deal between the US and Iran dominated sentiment after fighting in the Middle East intensified.

title: Chinese Firm Seeks $2.6 Billion Loan for Hong Kong Data Center
title_cn: 中国公司为香港数据中心寻求26亿美元贷款
summary: Chinese data center operator Range Intelligent Computing Technology Group Co. is seeking a loan of around HK$20 billion ($2.6 billion) to fund what would be Hong Kong’s largest computing facility, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Japan Spent Billions to Prop Up the Yen. Why Is It Still Weak?
title_cn: 日本花费数十亿美元支撑日元。为什么仍然疲软？
summary: The yen’s weakness has become a growing issue for Japan’s policymakers, given its impact on import prices and household costs.

title: LS Power Said to Near Deal for EDF’s American Renewables Arm
title_cn: LS Power 据称即将收购 EDF 的美国可再生能源部门
summary: LS Power LLC is in advanced talks to buy Electricite de France SA’s North American renewable power business amid rising energy demand to supply data centers, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Schroders' Olu-Pitan and Shonfeld's Lancaster on Finding Value in an AI World
title_cn: 施罗德的奥卢-皮坦和肖菲尔德的兰开斯特谈在人工智能世界中寻找价值
summary: Remi Olu-Pitan of Schroders and Colin Lancaster of Schonfeld join 'The Opening Trade' to discuss the outlook for markets amid massive AI investment and disruption. The two join the show on the back of their appearance at the MLIV Money & Macro event in London. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside Hudson River Trading's Blistering Token Burn | Odd Lots
title_cn: 哈德逊河交易 (Hudson River Trading) 的代币燃烧热潮背后零股
summary: Today's episode, which was recorded at our recent live show at New York's City Winery, follows up on a conversation we had with Iain Dunning, head of AI at Hudson River Trading, last year, in which we talked about how his firm uses AI. Now, some seven months later, we follow up on how one of the biggest market makers around is deploying this technology. We talk about the price of memory, bottlenecks in compute, how much HRT employees are actually spending on tokens, why the firm might develop its own chips, as well as AI-induced delirium. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hon Hai Sales Growth Accelerates Beyond Estimates in May
title_cn: 鸿海五月销售增速超预期
summary: Hon Hai Precision Industry Co.’s revenue rose 34% in the April to May period, underscoring demand for the Nvidia Corp. servers essential to AI infrastructure.

title: US Firm to Build $6.2 Billion Lesotho Hydro Project, Data Center
title_cn: 美国公司将建设价值 62 亿美元的莱索托水电项目和数据中心
summary: Convalt Energy, a US-based company, agreed to spend $6.2 billion to build a 1,200-megawatt hydro-power project and an artificial intelligence data center in Lesotho.

title: Korean Police Launch Gambling Probe Targeting Polymarket Users
title_cn: 韩国警方针对综合市场用户展开赌博调查
summary: South Korean police have launched an investigation into local users of Polymarket over alleged illegal gambling, as the prediction-market platform faces mounting regulatory scrutiny while expanding its presence in Asia.

title: Nvidia Clears Memory’s Big Three for Vera Rubin HBM4 Supply
title_cn: Nvidia 清除内存三巨头，为 Vera Rubin HBM4 供应
summary: Nvidia Corp. has certified the three biggest memory chipmakers to supply their most advanced high-bandwidth products for the US company’s AI accelerators, Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang confirmed for the first time.

title: Musk Leaves Investors Starstruck at Dimon’s SpaceX Extravaganza
title_cn: 马斯克在戴蒙的 SpaceX 盛会上让投资者大吃一惊
summary: Elon Musk can still enchant investors with his vision of the future.

title: Trump Officials Worry US Loophole Let Chinese Firms Buy Nvidia Blackwell Chips
title_cn: 特朗普官员担心美国存在漏洞让中国企业购买 Nvidia Blackwell 芯片
summary: Trump officials have spent the past week embroiled in a remarkable argument — over what, exactly, their China tech policy has been for the past year.

title: K2 AM's Boubouras on Markets, Investment Strategy
title_cn: K2 AM 的 Boubouras 谈市场、投资策略
summary: George Boubouras, Managing Director of Research, Investments and Advisory at K2 Asset Management, discusses his outlook for markets and investment strategy. He speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts and Shery Ahn on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Stock-Yuan Correlation Hits Three-Year High on Optimism
title_cn: 乐观情绪推动中国股市与人民币相关性创三年新高
summary: Chinese stocks and the yuan are moving increasingly in tandem as sentiment toward the country’s assets improves, driven by enthusiasm over artificial intelligence and investors’ push for diversification.

title: Amundi Says Asia Tech Rally Faces Fed Risk But No Bubble Yet
title_cn: Amundi表示亚洲科技股涨势面临美联储风险，但尚未出现泡沫
summary: Asia’s AI-led stock boom has room to run further unless a shift in US interest-rate expectations rattles the hyperscalers underpinning the investment cycle, according to Amundi, Europe’s largest asset manager.

title: SpaceX Boosts Japan Fundraising Goal to $2.5 Billion in Mega IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 将日本大型 IPO 融资目标提高至 25 亿美元
summary: SpaceX has increased the amount it’s planning to raise from the Japanese portion of its share sale by a quarter, indicating strong demand among the country’s retail investors.

title: Dajin Heavy Drops in Hong Kong Debut After $847 Million Listing
title_cn: 大金重工8.47亿美元上市后香港首秀大跌
summary: Shares of wind-power equipment maker Dajin Heavy Industry traded lower in their Hong Kong debut on Friday, following the biggest listing in the city in more than six weeks.

title: Broadcom Is Eschewing Acquisitions in Favor of AI Organic Growth
title_cn: 博通正在避免收购，转而支持人工智能的有机增长
summary: Broadcom Inc. Chief Executive Officer Hock Tan, who created the chip behemoth using a series of acquisitions, said the company is now less focused on dealmaking because AI offers stronger growth potential.

title: China Speeds Past Japan in Australian Car Imports on EV Bonanza
title_cn: 中国在澳大利亚电动汽车进口量上超越日本
summary: China has surged past Japan to become the biggest car supplier to Australia, with imports from companies such as BYD Co. accelerating to a record high, powered by demand for electric vehicles.

title: Meta AI Chief Sees Opportunity in Models’ Giving Health Advice
title_cn: Meta AI 负责人看到了模型提供健康建议的机会
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. Chief AI Officer Alexandr Wang said the company’s future artificial intelligence models will differentiate themselves from competitors through their consumer health capabilities.

title: IPOs, Huawei Plan Add to China’s $900 Billion Chip Stock Boom
title_cn: IPO、华为计划助推中国9000亿美元芯片股热潮
summary: The rally in China’s semiconductor stocks is poised to extend thanks to upcoming blockbuster IPOs and technology breakthroughs, investors and analysts say.

title: Broadcom Slides Most Since January 2025 on AI Outlook Miss
title_cn: 博通 (Broadcom) 在 AI 展望方面的跌幅为 2025 年 1 月以来最大
summary: Broadcom Inc. shares plunged by the most in more than 16 months after the company’s forecast for sales of its artificial intelligence chips disappointed investors.

title: Consumer Tech Leaders Discuss the Industry Future & AI
title_cn: 消费技术领袖讨论行业未来和人工智能
summary: Tom Conrad, CEO at Sonos; Holly Shelton, Chief Product Officer at Oura and Ann Crady Weiss, CEO at Hatch discuss consumer devices, AI integration and hardware innovation with Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX, Other Mega IPOs Denied Fast Index Entry by S&P
title_cn: 标准普尔拒绝将 SpaceX 和其他大型 IPO 快速纳入指数
summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices will keep its existing eligibility requirements for main benchmarks like the S&P 500 Index, rejecting proposals that would have made it faster for mega-cap companies such as Elon Musk’s SpaceX to gain rapid entry into the benchmark after going public.

title: Broadcom Results Weigh Down Chip Sector | The Close 6/4/2026
title_cn: 博通业绩拖累芯片行业|收盘价 2026 年 6 月 4 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Glenmede Chief of Investment, Strategy, and Research Jason Pride, Space Capital Founder & CEO Chad Anderson, World Labs Co-Founder & CEO Fei-Fei Li, SW Retail Advisors Founder & President Stacey Widlitz, SPG Global Managing Director Simon Gallagher, Goldman Sachs’ Asad Haider, Lazard Asset Management CIO Eric Van Nostrand, Coresight Research Founder & CEO Deborah Weinswig, The Conference Board Senior US Economist Yelena Shulyatyeva, Quantinuum CEO Raj Hazra, Ciena CEO Gary Smith, & Nike Global Football VP & GM Camilo Andrade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CME’s Duffy Voices ‘Grave Concerns’ With New Perps Contracts
title_cn: CME 的 Duffy 对新的 Perps 合同表示“严重担忧”
summary: Terry Duffy, the chief executive officer of CME Group Inc., said he is “very concerned” about the rise of so-called perpetual futures, an increasingly popular kind of financial contract that recently won key US regulatory approval.

title: AI, Xerox Debt and Canada’s ‘Lost Status’ at Sohn Montreal
title_cn: 人工智能、施乐债务和加拿大在 Sohn 蒙特利尔的“失去地位”
summary: Hedge fund managers and other investors are gathered at a conference in Montreal to pitch the next big thing, and everything from artificial intelligence, biotech and gold mining was on the table Thursday.

title: AI Scientist Bengio: Building Systems We Don't Know How to Control
title_cn: AI 科学家 Bengio：构建我们不知道如何控制的系统
summary: Yoshua Bengio, Founder & Scientific Advisor at Mila Quebec AI Institute and Co-President & Scientific Director at LawZero discusses AI safety, agent risks and governance frameworks. He warns that right now we don't have complete control of AI agents right now.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chip Stock Slump Rekindles Wall Street’s Buy-the-Dip Habit
title_cn: 芯片股暴跌重燃华尔街逢低买入的习惯
summary: As chipmakers suffered their worst day in more than two weeks, there were signs that some traders are betting the selloff will be short-lived.

title: Planet Labs Raises Outlook as War Drives Earth-Imaging Demand
title_cn: 战争推动地球成像需求，Planet Labs 提高前景
summary: Planet Labs raised its full-year guidance after reporting record quarterly sales fueled by demand from defense and government customers for its satellite imaging services.

title: Emerging-Market Stocks Sink as Broadcom Miss Revives AI Concerns
title_cn: 博通小姐重燃人工智能担忧，新兴市场股市下跌
summary: Emerging-market equities notched their worst day in roughly three weeks as Asian technology heavyweights retreated after a disappointing outlook from Broadcom Inc. raised concerns about the scale of the artificial-intelligence rally.

title: Bitcoin Has Longest Losing Streak Since August in Bruising Week
title_cn: 比特币在惨痛的一周中出现自八月以来最长的连续下跌
summary: Bitcoin posted its longest losing streak since August, weighed down by liquidations of bullish bets and this week’s rare sale of tokens by the dominant corporate buyer.

title: Serbia's Vucic on China Relationship, EU Accession
title_cn: 塞尔维亚武契奇谈中国关系和入盟
summary: Serbian President Aleksandar Vucic discusses China relations and the Balkan nation's accession negotiations with the European Union. He speaks to Bloomberg's Oliver Crook on June 1. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Second Malaysian State Calls Elections, Testing Anwar’s Grip
title_cn: 马来西亚第二个州号召大选，考验安华的掌控力
summary: A second Malaysian state this week dissolved its assembly and called for fresh elections, setting up a key test for Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s governing coalition.

title: US Accuses UK of ‘Two-Tiered Policing,’ Underlining Widening Gap
title_cn: 美国指责英国“双层警务”，凸显差距扩大
summary: The US accused the UK of biased policing, endorsing a prominent hard right criticism of Britain’s law enforcement in an unusual intervention that underscores the growing rift between the two allies.

title: US and Iran Show Little Progress in Talks After Week of Clashes
title_cn: 经过一周的冲突，美国和伊朗的谈判几乎没有取得任何进展
summary: The US and Iran have made little progress in talks over an interim peace deal this week, with the sides seeing their worst clashes since an April ceasefire began and fighting continuing in Lebanon.

title: AI Stocks Fall as Tech Momentum Fades, US-Iran Talks Stall | Daybreak Europe 6/05/2026
title_cn: 随着科技势头减弱、美伊谈判陷入僵局，人工智能股票下跌欧洲黎明 6/05/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

US equity-index futures declined along with Asian stocks as enthusiasm for the artificial-intelligence trade cooled after driving markets to record highs this year.

There was no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and as the Tehran-backed Hezbollah militia on Thursday rejected a US-brokered truce in Lebanon.

And Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy proposed peace talks to Russian leader Vladimir Putin in a rare and combative open letter, as efforts to end more than four years of war gained momentum.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xenophobia Resurgence in South Africa Sparks Violence Fears
title_cn: 南非仇外心理死灰复燃引发暴力恐惧
summary: On a thoroughfare that usually throbs with music, shouted bargains and the bustle of downtown Johannesburg, the metal shutters on the shops are closed.

title: Political Gridlock Saps Romania’s Fight Against Stagflation
title_cn: 政治僵局削弱了罗马尼亚抗击滞胀的能力
summary: When Mihai Bordeanu, the head of Renault’s Dacia car plant in Romania met with former prime minister Ilie Bolojan last month, he had bad news about the country’s flagship export: sales were dropping and the company needed to lay off workers.

title: Zelenskyy Proposes Peace Talks in Open Letter to Putin
title_cn: 泽伦斯基在给普京的公开信中提议进行和平谈判
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy proposed peace talks to Russian leader Vladimir Putin in an open letter on Thursday. The appeal came as officials from Germany, France and the UK have been discussing the possibility of holding talks involving Russia and Ukraine, according to people familiar with the matter. Bloomberg's Anthony Halpin reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xi to Visit North Korea Next Week for First Time Since 2019
title_cn: 习近平将于下周访问朝鲜，这是 2019 年以来首次
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping will travel to North Korea next week, marking his inaugural overseas trip of the year after recently hosting Donald Trump and Russia’s Vladimir Putin in Beijing.

title: US-Iran Talks at a Standstill as Hezbollah Rejects Truce
title_cn: 真主党拒绝停战，美伊谈判陷入停滞
summary: There was no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and Tehran-backed Hezbollah rejected a US-brokered truce in Lebanon. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Trump-Led Upheaval Has Changed Jens Stoltenberg’s World View
title_cn: 特朗普领导的剧变如何改变延斯·斯托尔滕贝格的世界观
summary: When Jens Stoltenberg was awarded the Kissinger Prize at a gala dinner hosted by the American Academy in Berlin in 2023, the then-NATO chief used his speech to caution against taking the transatlantic alliance for granted.

title: Ebola Bundibugyo Strain Spreads Fast
title_cn: 埃博拉本迪布焦菌株传播迅速
summary: The Ebola Bundibugyo strain is spreading fast with no known treatment or vaccine, and the international system built to contain outbreaks is in crisis. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Trade Envoy Urges China to Fix Trade Gap at Paris Meeting
title_cn: 欧盟贸易特使在巴黎会议上敦促中国解决贸易逆差
summary: European Union’s trade envoy told his Chinese counterpart to address the “unsustainable” trade imbalance between the two economies, as the bloc weighs new restrictive measures against Beijing.

title: Russia Turns to Familiar Playbook Ahead of Armenia’s Election
title_cn: 俄罗斯在亚美尼亚大选前采取熟悉的策略
summary: The South Caucasus nation is the target of pro-Kremlin interference as it seeks deeper ties with Europe and the US.

title: Poland’s Antisemitic Firebrand Exposes Ugly Side of Economic Boom
title_cn: 波兰的反犹太主义煽动者暴露了经济繁荣的丑陋一面
summary: He sees Jews, Ukrainians and the EU as Poland’s enemies in a range of conspiracy theories. Yet Grzegorz Braun is emerging as a key political force.

title: US-Iran Talks Progress Stalls After Hezbollah Rejects Truce
title_cn: 真主党拒绝停战后，美伊谈判进展陷入停滞
summary: There was no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and as the Tehran-backed Hezbollah militia on Thursday rejected a US-brokered truce in Lebanon.

title: India Seeks Deeper Venezuela Oil Ties After Rodríguez and Modi Meet
title_cn: 罗德里格斯和莫迪会面后，印度寻求与委内瑞拉加深石油联系
summary: India signaled interest in deeper energy ties with Venezuela, including sourcing crude supplies and investments in the country’s oil sector, after acting Venezuelan President Delcy Rodríguez held talks with Prime Minister Narendra Modi in New Delhi.

title: Indonesia’s Radical Export Plan Takes Effect as Doubts Swirl
title_cn: 印尼激进出口计划生效，疑虑重重
summary: Lingering uncertainty around Indonesia’s commodity export rules means traders are holding up some shipments just as radical changes come into effect, adding to strains on Southeast Asia’s largest economy.

title: Trump Shows Confidence in Long Anticipated US-India Trade Deal
title_cn: 特朗普对期待已久的美印贸易协议表现出信心
summary: US President Donald Trump expressed confidence that Washington and New Delhi will strike a long-awaited trade agreement after negotiators wrapped up a fresh round of talks this week.

title: Senate Votes Down Bids to Kill DOJ 'Anti-Weaponization Fund | Balance of Power: Late Edition
title_cn: 参议院投票否决了废除司法部“反武器化基金”的提议权力平衡：后期版
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Chris Coons, Democratic Senator of Delaware, said he filed an amendment that would prevent any payouts from President Trump's 'anti-weaponization' fund to those who attacked Capitol Hill Police officers during the January 6 riot, and Pete Ricketts, Republican Senator of Nebraska, says the Senate's Vote-a-Rama is  'solely about funding ICE and Border Patrol.' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Iran Talks Stall After Hezbollah Rejects Truce
title_cn: 真主党拒绝停火后美伊谈判陷入僵局
summary: There was no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and as the Tehran-backed Hezbollah militia rejected on Thursday a US-brokered truce in Lebanon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Key US House Committee Preparing Legislation to Forge Crypto Tax Structure
title_cn: 美国众议院主要委员会正在准备立法以制定加密货币税收结构
summary: A House panel with jurisdiction over tax policy is readying legislation to address the taxation of cryptocurrencies for release as early as Friday, before a hearing early next week.

title: Trump Slams California’s Slow Results as Vote Count Drags On
title_cn: 特朗普猛烈抨击加州计票进展缓慢
summary: President Donald Trump accused California Democrats of “big cheating” in the state as the vote count continues — drawing a rebuke from Democratic Governor Gavin Newsom and other officials who have warned all along that the results would take time.

title: Digital: Senator Chris Coons (D-DE)
title_cn: 数字：参议员克里斯·库恩斯 (D-DE)
summary: Chris Coons, Democratic Senator of Delaware and member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, said he filed an amendment that would prevent any payouts from President Trump's 'anti-weaponization' fund to those who attacked Capitol Hill Police officers during the January 6 riot and said he would not vote to confirm Todd Blanche for Attorney General. He also discussed the US' naval blockade against Cuba and warned of a 'humanitarian crisis' as a result. Senator Coons spoke with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sen. Ricketts: Funding Bill Solely Focused on ICE, CBP
title_cn: 参议员 Ricketts：拨款法案仅针对 ICE、CBP
summary: Pete Ricketts, Republican Senator of Nebraska, says the Senate's Vote-a-Rama is  'solely about funding ICE and Border Patrol' and that the funding bill cannot pass with an amendment to kill President Trump's 'anti-weaponization' fund because it would lose its privileged status as a reconciliation bill. Senator Ricketts also discussed how he would 'reserve judgement' on Bill Pulte's nomination for Intelligence Director and Todd Blanche's nomination for Attorney General until they speak to the Senate. He joins Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Sanctions Cuba’s Díaz-Canel as Trump Ramps Up Pressure
title_cn: 特朗普加大压力，美国制裁古巴迪亚斯-卡内尔
summary: The US slapped sanctions on Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel and members of his family, further ratcheting up pressure on the communist-run Caribbean island.

title: AI Future Takes Center Stage at Bloomberg Tech | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/4/2026
title_cn: 人工智能未来成为彭博科技的中心舞台 |彭博商业周刊日报 6/4/2026
summary:
Sameer Samat, Android Ecosystem president, discusses android's AI buildout and integration of artificial intelligence across all aspects of daily life.
Yoshua Bengio, AI expert and founder and scientific advisor at Mila Quebec AI Institute, breaks down the geopolitical risk of a fast-paced AI ramp up without guardrails.
Also, Bloomberg's Tom Giles talks to Verizon CEO Dan Schulman discuss Schulman's first months at the company and how Verizon is integrating AI into its business plan. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Says Antares’ Small Nuclear Reactor Reaches ‘Criticality’
title_cn: 美国称安塔瑞斯小型核反应堆已达到“临界”
summary: The Trump administration announced a small modular nuclear reactor reached a critical milestone Thursday.

title: Trump Says He Will Headline Rally Marking US’s 250th Anniversary
title_cn: 特朗普称他将主持纪念美国成立 250 周年的集会
summary: President Donald Trump said he would headline a rally in Washington on June 24th to mark the 250th anniversary of the US, a week after several artists pulled out of planned shows on the National Mall.

title: Private Jet Club Owner Guilty of $15 Million Charter Flight Scam
title_cn: 私人飞机俱乐部老板犯有价值 1500 万美元的包机诈骗罪
summary: A Maryland man who ran a company offering charter flights on private jets was convicted of defrauding customers out of $15 million, according to the US Department of Justice.
